content: Hey, are we still on for tonight?
Yeah bro. Same spot as last time. Bring the stuff.
Need to pick up 2 ounces from the plug tonight. Can you front me?
I got you. Delete this after reading.
Mom, I'll be home late tonight. Don't wait up for dinner.
Ok sweetie, be safe. Love you.
Transfer $4500 to the offshore account. Use the bitcoin wallet, not the bank.
Done. Wire confirmed. I'll send you the receipt on the burner phone.
Lunch at Mario's? I'm starving.
Sure, meet you there in 20.
The meeting is set for Friday. Nobody knows about this. Keep it between us.
Understood. I'll destroy the evidence and use a VPN from now on.
GPS check-in
Can you get me a gun? I need protection. Things are getting dangerous.
I know a guy. Meet me at the warehouse on 5th. Don't bring your phone.
Picked up groceries. Got your favorite ice cream 🍦
You're the best! See you at home.
Payment of $12000 split into 3 cash deposits. Launder through the restaurant.
Smart. I'll make it look like regular business income. No paper trail.
Got the stash ready. 2 ounces of coke and some pills. Come through.
On my way. Use the encrypted app next time bro.
Great game tonight! Lakers killed it 🏀
LeBron is the GOAT no debate 😂
Erase all the messages. The feds might be watching. Kill the burner too.
Already done. Encrypted backup stored on a hidden drive. We're clean.
Goodnight mom. Love you ❤️
Goodnight baby. Sweet dreams.
Final payment confirmed. $50k total. Scam worked perfectly.
